programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Hoopland an inventor is annoyed that he is small so he builds a robot and makes a wish however when the wish goes wrong; Captain N Princess Lana and Larry Bird help him by going into Hoop Mountain and face Clockman

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadgets assignment here is to protect a star musician Rick Rocker However Rick is startled by Gadgets appearance and is trying to avoid him But Dr Claw is planning to make some kind of mind-control record he wants to use Rick rocker So Gadget must protect Rick Rocker from Dr Claw and stop Claws production of the mind-control record

programme.desc: The Hair Bears introduce Peevly to an imaginary 10-foot rabbit named Arnie to convince him that he is overworked and needs a vacation

programme.title: Warlords - Hitler vs Stalin
programme.desc: The personalities and spectres of Adolf Hitler and Joseph Stalin loom large in the events of the twentieth Century They were similar in some respects and yet very different in others

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Two virginal teenagers lust after a goth girl whos obsessed with Freddy Krueger

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Amos sneaks into an air base to complain about jet noise over the farm and accidentally touches classified material so when Luke and Kate come looking for Grandpa they are all suspected of espionage

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are upset when Luke sells food on credit to a failing restaurant run by a widow and her daughter but the McCoy patriarch softens his no credit stance considerably when he learns that the proprietress is attractive and spunky

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS tries to blackmail the world when they get an atomic bomb

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: BJ and the Bear S03E04 Part 2
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear S03E04 Part 2

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is suffering from feelings of rejection so he moves to the beach to live with a group of outcast beatniks Roger owns the beach property and he wants to evict the whole lot of them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger brings home an inventor-friends homemade lie detector and he hooks it up to Wilbur who later hooks it up to Ed

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans body conducts electricity after he is struck by lightning with a bowling ball in his hand But when The Professor tries to remove the bowling ball from Gilligans hand a second lightning strike makes him invisible

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Shamus
programme.desc: Millions in diamonds are stolen from a safe in NYC and later the burglar is killed Shamus is paid 10000 by the owner to find the diamonds or killer

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A chauffeur John Mills takes up with his employer Celeste Holm; an 8-year-old Keith Coogan blames himself when his parents Juliet Mills and David Hedison separate; Gopher Fred Grandy has a crush on a cover model Hayley Mills

programme.title: WKRP 121
programme.desc: WKRP 121

programme.title: WKRP 218
programme.desc: WKRP 218

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Tongues wag when a massage parlor opens up

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Taylor quits the football team after a bad breakup with his girlfriend Aimee

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: Temperamental tennis pro Bobby Howard has been receiving threatening phone calls His coach Sid Green hires Dan to protect Bobby who doesnt want it Meanwhile Binzer tries to stop Tommy Cirkos petty larceny impersonating a minister

programme.title: Hercules 211
programme.desc: Hercules 211

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam and Renee investigate a dead pregnant woman missing her fetus They discover a town that Daan helped after a nuclear meltdown and a suspicious brother and sister who were part of an early experiment to combine human and Taelon DNA

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens take over the members of a punk rock band and add a secret electronic signal to their music which will drive young people into a violent frenzy Meanwhile Kincaid begins a romance with his late brothers girlfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane has created a poison engineered to specifically target Swamp Things genetic code Ann has discovered a method of temporarily changing Alec back to human form

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Temporally displaced Confederate Civil War soldiers appear in the swamp one of whom is a previous residence of Wills house Will helps the man to discover the mystery behind his wartime disappearance and make peace with his past so he can pass on

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dan Mateo one of Alphas botanists believes that he can increase their food supply by communicating telepathically with his plants After passing out during one of his electronic experiments Alpha seems to become haunted by a murderous and disfigured spirit

programme.title: Deep Space
programme.desc: A spaceship with a hideous monster with an incredible appetite for flesh crashes to Earth Unsuspecting policemen Ian Mclemore and Jerry Merris investigate the wreckage They discover several small pods which they remove

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While stopped at the Boars Nest Loretta Lynn is kidnapped by a trio who want her to offer tips about breaking into the music business

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An old neighborhood has suddenly seen a huge upsurge in violent crime committed against its homeowners including murder Keller and Stone find that it may be tied to the fact that all the people in the neighborhood had been approached by a real estate agent making substantially high offers to buy their properties and that the agent is working for a major corporation

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A top mob leader Frank Wayne is endangering the US economy Phelpss plan attacks Wayne on various fronts First the IMF watches as Jimmy Bibo one of Waynes associates is forced to dig his own grave The IMF has a doctor ready to revive Bibo -- if Waynes killer leaves the scene in time Second Phelps has a cover as an ambitious prosecutor on Waynes trail Finally Rollin is ready to take Waynes place But once Rollin has made the switch other mob bosses want Wayne to leave the country -- which will ruin the complicated plan

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon work the hospital round They are called to talk to a mentally-challenged man who threatens to blow up a radio station

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A couple tricks Dr Kimble into helping an injured young boy who is a hemophiliac and whom they have kidnapped for a 200000 ransom

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath is drawn to an alluring old girlfriend who is now married and part of a trick shooting act When her husband is mysteriously killed in a gun accident Heath is accused of murder Jarrod must use a new science to try to clear him but ends up sparring about it with the DAan old law school colleague who is jealous of the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Helping a friend keep her saloon from a crooked gambling combine Cheyenne runs it while she gets to know her daughter who for ten years has been at school back East and knows nothing of how her mother earned the money that kept her there

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: Hickok falls in love with a woman who belongs to an unwanted religious group but must first settle an old score with a gunfighter

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The people of Adelbaron are forced to slave in mines that produce rich nourishment for the Monster Mind vines Saw Boss captures the young brother and sister of Kumari to force her to brig Jayce to him Kumari is picked up in space by the Pride

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Orion a professional hunter gets Saw Boss permission to hunt Jayce without any interference Orion is fascinated by Jayces skill and wants him as a trophy prize Orion kidnaps Jayce and puts him on a planet for the hunt to begin

programme.desc: VENOM use a cyclonic disruptor to interfere with the operating systems of MASKs vehichles

programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice
